body:
sapphic-dice:

List of reactions I have had to seeing pretty women naked.

- Standing in place, frozen, eyes staring.

- Incompressible fax machine noises, trying to hide my blushing face.

- Grabbing boobs.

- Sharing random pigeon facts.

- Drooling.

- Curling up behind the bed and refusing to look.

Hmmmm. I think additional testing may be required.

~starts going through photos~
